Request Latency Over Time as Pool Saturates
Alert: Slack/ PagerDuty | Action: Scale up
Alert: PagerDuty P1 | Action: Enable backpressure
All requests pass through | Error rate < 5%
If success -> CLOSED, if fail -> OPEN
